message:
Add dirs dependency to rch-wkr and fix platform-dependent cache tests

Add the 'dirs' crate as a workspace dependency for rch-wkr to enable
platform-aware cache directory resolution. Previously, cache_path tests
hardcoded /tmp/rch as the expected base directory, which fails on
platforms where the cache directory differs (e.g., macOS uses
~/Library/Caches).

Updated tests to use cache_path_in with an explicit known base path,
making assertions platform-independent:
- test_cache_path_empty_hash: uses /tmp/rch-test base instead of
  relying on default platform cache dir
- test_cache_path_special_chars: same fix, with explicit expected path

Also reformats a long assertion in test_cache_path_long_hash to
multi-line for readability.

Cargo.lock updated to reflect the new dirs dependency for rch-wkr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
